description: Integer division `//` replaced with `/`, producing a float used as list index (TypeError at runtime).
diff:
diff --git a/stats.py b/stats.py
--- a/stats.py
+++ b/stats.py
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 def get_median(values):
     sorted_vals = sorted(values)
-    mid = len(sorted_vals) // 2
+    mid = len(sorted_vals) / 2
     return sorted_vals[mid]
